html:
European Commission, Daily News, Brussels, June 29, 2026.

The EU is providing emergency assistance and organizing a humanitarian flight in response to the earthquakes in Venezuela.

In reaction to the increasing humanitarian needs caused by...
tldr: Following severe earthquakes, the EU is sending emergency aid to Venezuela and organizing flights with essential supplies.
lattlast:
The European Union, a union of countries in Europe, has decided to provide assistance to the people of Venezuela. This is being done because those affected need help quickly following major earthquakes that have caused damage and hardship.

The EU will organize flights carrying emergency aid to the region. The goal is to deliver essential supplies directly to the people who have been impacted by the disaster.

The aid is being sent because the needs in the country have increased significantly after the earthquakes. By acting swiftly, it is hoped that suffering among those affected can be alleviated.
